'''Red 2''' was a [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was assigned to [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]]<ref name="CCG-Red2" /> and stationed at the [[Great Temple/Legends|Rebel base]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].<ref name="ANH" /> The fighter was piloted by [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] during the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="CCG-Red2" />

During the battle, Antilles piloted Red 2 into the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star's]] [[Meridian trench/Legends|trench]] alongside [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]]. While providing cover for Skywalker as he attempted to launch [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] into the Death Star's [[Thermal exhaust port/Legends|thermal exhaust port]], Red 2 was hit by weapons fire from pursuing [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] fighters<ref name="ANH" /> that destroyed the X-wing's [[Micro-maneuvering control/Legends|micro-maneuvering controls]].<ref name="CCG-Red2" /> Antilles was forced to pull out of the trench,<ref name="ANH" /> and his nurse Red 2 back to Yavin 4.<ref name="CCG-Red2" />
